job_summary: A Clinical Trial Assistant supports the administrative and operational aspects of clinical trials, ensuring documentation, communication, and logistics are handled efficiently.
key_responsibilities: Maintain Trial Master File (TMF) and essential documents
Assist CRAs in site management and monitoring preparation
Track study progress, timelines, and deliverables
Coordinate communication between sponsors, CROs, and sites
Manage investigator files and regulatory documents
qualifications: Bachelor’s in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
skills_required: coordinate communication between sponsors, cros, and sites
manage investigator files and regulatory documents
track study progress, timelines, and deliverables
